## Pattern name

<!-- Short, descriptive name. -->

## Category

<!-- Which WCAG 2.2 success criterion or category this applies to (e.g., "SC 2.4.11 Focus Not Obscured", "Forms / labeling", "ARIA components / dialog"). -->

## What should the reviewer look for

<!-- Describe the signal the reviewer should detect, in plain language. -->

## Why this pattern matters

<!-- What class of accessibility issue does it catch? What does a miss look like in practice for a user of assistive technology? -->

## DO / DON'T sketch (optional)

<!-- Rough code sketch of the anti-pattern and the fix. The maintainer will polish before adopting. -->

## References

<!-- Links to W3C WCAG, WAI-ARIA, MDN, the WAI-ARIA Authoring Practices Guide (APG), vendor docs, or expert write-ups that support the pattern. -->
